confidence_rationale: Video shows tabletop demonstration rather than laparoscopic trainer environment. Cannot verify precise loop positioning relative to marked line, appendage integrity, or exact cinching quality due to hand manipulation outside proper testing environment.
cannot_determine: Exact distance from marked line - no clear view of measurement marks
Loop cinching tightness - cannot assess tension adequately from hand demonstration
Whether this represents actual FLS testing conditions - appears to be educational demonstration
technique_summary: Demonstration shows understanding of endoloop mechanics and deployment sequence. However, this appears to be a tabletop educational demonstration rather than formal FLS testing in a laparoscopic trainer.
improvement_suggestions: Perform task in proper laparoscopic trainer environment
Ensure clear visibility of measurement marks for accurate placement
Use proper laparoscopic instruments for deployment
